inputs.label: Current Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Measured actual wall thickness from ultrasonic testing (UT) gauge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured actual wall thickness from ultrasonic testing (UT) gauge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ultrasonik test (UT) cihazından ölçülen gerçek duvar kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene tatsächliche Wanddicke aus der Ultraschallprüfung (UT).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur réelle mesurée par jauge à ultrasons (UT).

inputs.label: Minimum Allowable Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum thickness required by design code (e.g., ASME B31.3) before replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum thickness required by design code (e.g., ASME B31.3) before replacement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değiştirme öncesi tasarım kodunun (ör. ASME B31.3) gerektirdiği minimum kalınlık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestdicke gemäß Auslegungscode (z. B. ASME B31.3) vor Austausch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur minimale requise par le code de conception (ex. ASME B31.3) avant remplacement.

inputs.label: Corrosion Rate (mm/year)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated uniform corrosion rate based on historical UT data or industry standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated uniform corrosion rate based on historical UT data or industry standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçmiş UT verileri veya endüstri standartlarına dayalı tahmini üniform korozyon hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte gleichmäßige Korrosionsrate basierend auf historischen UT-Daten oder Industriestandards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de corrosion uniforme estimé basé sur des données UT historiques ou des normes industrielles.

inputs.label: Measurement Confidence Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor to account for UT measurement uncertainty (≥1.0).

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety factor to account for UT measurement uncertainty (≥1.0).
businessContext_i18n.tr: UT ölçüm belirsizliğini hesaba katmak için güvenlik faktörü (≥1.0).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité pour tenir compte de l'incertitude de mesure UT (≥1,0).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
